title: If Shinji had a cold personality
display_title: If Shinji had a cold personality
wikitext:
[]: If Shinji had a cold personality             Quote Post by Thomas68 » Thu Jun 26, 2014 7:18 pm Hello! I'm new around here and I've just signed today and I'm gonna start my first topic with this subject: If Shinji had a cold personality (not necessarily like Gendo), would he be able to avoid the suffering he have in his life? I believe if he were less caring and melancholic about his past and people who usually berate, abandon and hurt him, making his life worse, he wouldn't care to these problems (like any cold person) and would concentrate in his objectives (if he have one). I was thinking recently about this and I wonder if the EVA fans (especially Shinji fans) would like if he abandon his kind and sensible personality, because I once read a fanfic with Shinji and Asuka where he kinda changes his personality but in the final he turns back to his old personality. What you guys think? Should Shinji continue kind, loving and caring or become cold, non-caring and individualist?

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Fri Jun 27, 2014 3:04 am If Shinji had a cold personality the story wouldn't even had happened: he would had told his father to fuck off, leave as soon as the first episode (or wouldn't even had come to Tokyo-3), Rei would have to fight Sachiel and who knows what would had happened. Alternately, assuming Shinji stays at NERV, his coldness make him not getting close to Rei, so she won't start to question Gendo, and in the end would had started his version of Instrumentality, game over for everyone else.

[]:             Quote Post by Thomas68 » Fri Jun 27, 2014 7:02 am Thanks for the reply! But I still wonder what would be the way he would deal with the rest of the cast...

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE » Fri Jun 27, 2014 8:11 am I consider myself as a huge Shinji-fan. And i really thought about this stuff too. In the tv-show Shinji is very cynical, boring and housebroken. Cold personalities are known as somehow distant. They can't get along with ppl. And the whole rest. But the question is (esp. in a fanfic) from what would he benefit if he stays at NT-3? If he would develop in this kind of person (by the time of episode 7) he would likely be more "Kaji-like" towards Asuka. He wouldn't compete with her and would literally stay away from Misato. But in the end he is alone. And suffer from relation- and friendship isn't so bad compared to be alone. Its like Toji told him at E17. He would have never imagened that Shinji would actually do something for other people. So he looks like this kind of person to other ppl. Asuka watch him in the same manner: he seemingly rejects her for not being mature enough. And this breaks it down to the competition. If Shinji would be a cold person the other character looses their drives and impact, especially Asuka. Misato is a James Bond-Stand Alone, Rei can take care of herself and don't have to be a doll. It feels like killing Shinji off for good like in Aoi .

[]:             Quote Post by Thomas68 » Fri Jun 27, 2014 9:31 am Interesting POV, SEELE... But... Not wanting to annoy you or anyone with my curiosity, but... I wonder how would Asuka be affected by his suppositional coldness since she usually hides her feelings for him in a way that we don't know if she love or hate him? She usually acts like she dosen't give a damn for him, but she just proves the opposite and somehow she cares for him. Anyway... Thanks for the reply!

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE » Fri Jun 27, 2014 9:58 am Thomas68 wrote: Interesting POV, SEELE... But... Not wanting to annoy you or anyone with my curiosity, but... I wonder how would Asuka be affected by his suppositional coldness since she usually hides her feelings for him in a way that we don't know if she love or hate him? She usually acts like she dosen't give a damn for him, but she just proves the opposite and somehow she cares for him. Anyway... Thanks for the reply!

[]:             Quote Post by Thomas68 » Fri Jun 27, 2014 10:52 am I believe the cold personality would be a suprise to some characters (Gendo, Fuyutsuki, Ritsuko and Rei) and heartbreaking to others (Asuka, Misato, Kaji, Toji and Kensuke) becuase: - It would annoy Asuka more than she is annoyed, since she is known for seeking attention from him and his coldness would make her irate and probably she would cry when no one is near. - It would hurt Misato, since she is like a "mother figure" to him. - It would disappoint Kaji, since he is like a "father/ older brother" to him. - It would suprise and disappoint Toji and Kensuke, since they are his friends. It looks perfect to a fanfic theme, but my original thought before creating this topic was: If Shinji suddenly changes his friendly personality to a cold personality would the other characters like it? Would the fans like it?

[]:             Quote Post by Ray » Fri Jun 27, 2014 3:49 pm I'm actually writing a fic where, after all he's been through. He finally becomes this. The point of the fic is to pull him out of it, but . . .yeah a cold personality would be . . .different.

[]:             Quote Post by Rosenakahara » Fri Jun 27, 2014 6:47 pm He would be manga Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by Thomas68 » Fri Jun 27, 2014 7:08 pm @ Ray : Is it a Shinji/Asuka fanfic? When you finish it can you pass me the link where you posted? @ Rosenakahara : Nah... Manga Shinji is not cold... He's an asshole...

[]:             Quote Post by Ray » Fri Jun 27, 2014 8:41 pm I've only got 4 chapters down in outline so far. I'm planning on posting them but I'm currently occupied by RL issues. . .No shipping so far, but who knows?

[]:             Quote Post by Thomas68 » Fri Jun 27, 2014 9:39 pm Thanks, Ray! Just one more question... Are you going to post on fanficiton.net?

[]:             Quote Post by Ray » Fri Jun 27, 2014 9:58 pm I dunno at this point. . .probably.

[]:             Quote Post by Thomas68 » Sat Jun 28, 2014 10:19 am Well, I think I'll start writing a fanfic about this too, but instead of cold, he'll have a double personality... Probably somebody already wrote something like this, but I was thinking in writing a fanfic where Shinji has a good/evil personality.
